title: The Collapsed Overpass
description: A highway overpass lies snapped across the canyon, its rusted rebar clawing at the sky. A glint of an old supply cache shows in the rubble — but the whole slab groans whenever the wind shifts.

options.text: Pick the wreckage clean, slow and careful
options.result: You spend the afternoon prying loose what won't bring the slab down. A modest haul of scrap and coin, and all your fingers intact.

options.text: [Charm 5] Flag down a passing scav crew to brace it for a cut
options.result: Your easy patter wins over the scav crew. They jack the slab on hydraulics, you split the cache, and everyone walks away richer.

options.text: [Luck] Crawl under the groaning slab for the deep cache
options.result_success: The slab holds. You drag out a sealed crate of refined core and a fat purse before scrambling clear.
options.result_fail: The wind shifts. Concrete shears loose and pins your leg — you wrench free bleeding, the cache buried for good.
